arts.ttl: Paul Warne makes Derby County admission in first MK Dons press conference
arts.sum: Paul Warne said he spoke to a "few clubs" about his next move after leaving Derby County but is excited by the potential of MK Dons. I liked a lot of things about it and I loved the fact that mostly we were allowed to come in with the chairman's backing to really imprint our culture and try to help the club where it wants to go.

arts.ttl: Sky Sports pundit pinpoints what holds key to 'great' Derby County transfer this summer
arts.sum: Sky Sports pundit Lee Hendrie believes signing Marcus Harness on a permanent basis would be a "great coup" for Derby County, but feels survival would be key to any deal at Pride Park. But Hendrie says a lot of that depends on whether Derby can stay in the Championship but if they do, feels a deal would be a no brainer.

arts.ttl: John Eustace makes Luton Town admission as he identifies what could be Derby County 'problem'
arts.sum: Speaking ahead of visit of Matt Bloomfield's side, Eustace said: "It is another tough game on Friday. John Eustace is mindful of Luton Town's Premier League experience but says Derby County will be ready for their crunch Championship clash on Good Friday.

arts.ttl: Preview: Derby County vs. Luton Town - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Friday's Championship clash between Derby County and Luton Town, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Ian Wright 'absolutely worried' as he and Gary Neville nail Derby County's £100m problem
arts.sum: Neville can see promoted teams panic about how much they can spend in case they go down and face the financial consequences – and an anomaly like Nottingham Forest, who wrote big cheques to beat the system, both still almost got relegated and were then hit by penalties for breaking Premier League profit and sustainability rules. Neville said: “There’s a football question (about why teams are going straight back down) but there is also the financial disparity between what’s happening in the Championship and Premier League and we’ve talked about this for years.”
